handoffs.problemStatement:
Goal: Migrate to canonical anchor-based ACE system
Requested outcomes: Update or check the status of RGS nodes.
Why ACE believes this: Project alignment 100%, Actionability 88%, Architecture fit 56%.
Constraints and review signals: Ensure compatibility during migration | Constraint coverage: No clear constraints or review gates were stated..
Still unclear: Determine if the RGS nodes are part of the external target config or managed by the runtime
